parameters.name: _limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to be included on each page in the response. Fewer rows can be returned, if the query does not yield that many.

parameters.name: _offset
parameters.description: Pagination identifier that is returned to the app by the API response when this uses the HATEOAS '_prev' or '_next' links. The app can navigate from the last returned page to the next or previous page, or to the first page if no offset is specified, but to no other pages.

parameters.name: _sort
parameters.description: Maximum number of rows to be included on each page in the response. Fewer rows can be returned, if the query does not yield that many.

parameters.name: _fields
parameters.description: It makes it possible to select fields of the entity to recover. The fields will be separated by the character ",". This mechanism can be used with HATEOAS.

parameters.name: _query
parameters.description: It makes it possible to search a list of entities based on one or more fields of the entity. Accepts the following operators: =, >, <, >=, <=, <>, like, in, not in, between, is null, is not null.

sourceCode.description: Source of the note data origin

sourceDescription.description: Source description of the note data origin

BusinessMetaData.description: Business metadata for form and data

CaseStartApplicant.description: Data structure containing information about an applicant

CaseStartTaskData.description: Data structure containing information about a task

data.description: Unstructured data required for creation of task and data management. Has two main sections: processData and additionalData. Additional data follows a specific structure: AdditionalDataRequest. Also processData has a json format dynamic for each process that will be sent by process manager engine as tasks[].data value

CaseStart.description: Data structure containing information about a business process management case. A business process management case is an instance of a business process management process.

caseId.description: Unique identifier of the business case

externalReference.description: Unique external identifier for the case

items.description: Array of applicants associated with the case
List of tasks data associated with the case

CaseStartAccessPoint.description: Data structure containing information about an access point for business process management

CaseStartCenter.description: Data structure containing information about a bank centre

centerId.description: Unique identifier of the bank centre

CaseStartInitUser.description: Data structure containing information about a user access point for business process management. The user access point defines who can access the case, how they access it, and what their role is in relation to the case.

CaseStartProcess.description: Data structure containing information about a business process management process. This process is a series of tasks that an applicant must perform to obtain a bank product or service.

processId.description: Unique identifier of the business process

CaseStartRequest.description: Data structure containing the request details for creating a business process management case

case.description: Data structure containing information about a business process management case. A business process management case is an instance of a business process management process.

CaseStartUser.description: Data structure containing information about a user

CaseStartResponse.description:
Data structure containing information about a business process management case. A business process management case is an instance of a business process management process.
This data structure is the response to a request to create a business process management case.

center.description: Center where the case is being processed

caseId.description: Unique identifier of the business case

items.description: List of tasks associated with the case. Usually: first task to be executed.

Communication.description: Data structure containing information about a communication sent to a party

ContactPoint.description: Data structure containing information about a contact point. A contact point is a phone number, physical address, or virtual address used for communication purposes.

DocumentComposerDocumentProperty.description: Data structure containing information about a document property

code.description: Language code. The value uses the format 'dialect-country', where 'dialect' is an ISO 639-1 language code and 'country' is an ISO 3166-1 country code.

Owner.description: Data structure containing owners for the document property

PhoneAddress.description: Data structure containing information that identifies a phone address

mobileNumber.description: Mobile phone number, as defined by a telecom service

code.description:
Language code.

The value uses the format 'dialect-country', where 'dialect' is an ISO 639-1 language code and 'country' is an ISO 3166-1 country code.

SendingMethod.description: Data structure containing information about a delivery method

StoreMultiTemplateDocument.description: Data structure containing information about a document stored or intended to be stored in a document repository system such as Filenet

mimeType.description: Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions (MIME) type format for the document file

Template.description: Data structure containing information about a template for sending communications to a party

WrapperCustomerCommunicationRequest.description: Data structure containing information about a communication request. A communication request is an instance of a communication with a defined sender and recipient.

attachments.description: Array of documents to be attached to the communication request

originReference.description: Unique reference for the communication request's origin

scheduledSendTime.description:
Date and time when the communication is scheduled to be sent. The value uses the complete data format defined in ISO 8601: 'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD' Where:
  • YYYY: 4-digit year
  • MM: 2-digit month (for example, 01 = January)
  • DD: 2-digit day of the month (01 through 31)
  • hh: 2-digit hour of the day (00 through 23)
  • mm: 2-digit minute of the hour (00 through 59)
  • ss: 2-digit seconds (00 through 59)
  • TZD: Time zone indicator

confirmationRequest.description: Whether the delivery provider must confirm a successful message delivery

sendingMethods.description: Array of delivery methods for the communication request

_links.description: Links to the next and previous pages with element count

UserAccessPointRequest.description: Data structure containing information about a user access point for business process management. The user access point defines who can access the case, how they access it, and what their role is in relation to the case.

ApiEvent.description: Data structure containing information about an event

actionCode.description: Code for the action to be executed when the event occurs

data.description: Unstructured data required for event management

ManageEventRequest.description: Data structure containing the required information to manage an event for a business process management case.

Note.description: Note model representing a note in the system

CalendarsResponse.description: Response model for calendars containing a list of dates and links to calendar resources.

LinksCalendarList.description: Data structure containing the links for the calendar list

links.description: Links for pagination and other actions related to the calendar list
